profile.name: Priyanka Panneerselvam
profile.role: Full-Stack Developer | Machine Learning & Data Science
profile.summary: I build practical, end-to-end software systems that solve everyday problems. My work spans AI, data handling, and full-stack development, with projects focused on education, healthcare, and agriculture. I enjoy turning messy requirements into structured, working solutions.
profile.vision:
To design and build intelligent, reliable digital solutions that solve real-world problems—not just look good on a screen.
I aim to bridge strong engineering fundamentals with thoughtful user experience and data-driven decision-making.
My vision is to continuously evolve as a problem-solver who delivers scalable, ethical, and impactful technology.
I believe in learning fast, building responsibly, and creating products that add measurable value to people and systems.
Long term, I aspire to contribute to technology that improves efficiency, accessibility, and everyday life.
profile.mission:
My mission is to consistently build practical, well-engineered solutions using modern technologies and strong problem-solving skills.
I focus on writing clean, maintainable code and designing systems that are efficient, scalable, and user-centric.
Through continuous learning and hands-on projects, I aim to strengthen my expertise in full-stack development and data-driven systems.
I strive to turn complex requirements into simple, functional products that deliver real value.
Every project I take on is an opportunity to improve quality, performance, and impact.

projects.title: TrustAI: Ethical AI Governance
projects.description: An innovative platform for transparency and fairness in banking AI systems. Features AI decision explanations, bias detection, and ethical governance to build customer trust and meet regulations.

projects.title: Antariksh DualFusion
projects.description: Deep Learning-based solution designed for the Bharatiya Antariksh Hackathon 2025. Fuses dual low-resolution satellite images into a single super-resolved high-resolution output using custom neural networks.

projects.title: LocalHive: Service Platform
projects.description: A comprehensive service booking platform connecting customers with nearby providers. Features real-time emergency booking, provider dashboards, and automated reporting systems.

projects.title: Tourism BI Analytics
projects.description: Analytics web app exploring visitor trends, safety, and infrastructure across Indian states. Leverages IBM Cognos for advanced data visualization and decision-making insights.

projects.title: Eco-Cart AI Assistant
projects.description: Intelligent shopping companion that promotes sustainable consumption by utilizing AI to analyze products and suggest eco-friendly alternatives to users.

projects.title: PandemicPulse Tracker
projects.description: A centralized monitoring system designed to visualize pandemic trends and optimize resource distribution through data-driven health metrics.

projects.title: DBMS Engine Core
projects.description: Exploration and implementation of core database management systems, focusing on optimized query execution, indexing, and ACID compliance fundamentals.

education.degree: Bachelor of Technology in Artificial Intelligence and Data Science
education.description: Specialized in Artificial Intelligence and Data Science with CGPA 8.33

achievements.title: Best UI Design Award
achievements.description: Awarded for the most intuitive and accessible user interface in the healthcare track.

achievements.title: Open Source Contributor
achievements.description: Contributed 50+ PRs to various open-source libraries including React ecosystems.
